title: CommandCenterUI: hidden panels visible (CSS display overrides [hidden])
description: Operator screenshot (Pictures/Screenshot from 2026-07-02 13-46-17.png) shows the agent screen panel open+empty over the chat, and the Start-lab banner visible while agents are in the room. Root cause: .screen-panel, .lab-banner, and .mention-hint set display:flex in CSS, which overrides the UA stylesheet's display:none for the HTML hidden attribute, so JS toggling .hidden has no effect. Fix with a global [hidden]{display:none!important} rule.
acceptance_criteria: Screen panel, lab banner, and mention hint are invisible whenever their hidden attribute is set
